title: GoldRecord
description: Schema for datasets/expected.jsonl gold evaluation records. Grounded in the actual JSONL corpus (126 records) and eval_runner.py consumption code.

FieldExtraction.description: Mock extraction field: claimed value + evidence span. Evidence may be null in gold records (e.g., has_po=false with no PO to cite).

value.description: Expected value (str, number, bool, or null).

evidence.description: Verbatim evidence span, or null when no evidence applies.

file.description: Filename of the invoice text in datasets/gold_invoices/.

po_match.description: Whether the PO matches for 3-way match simulation.

expected_status.description: Acceptable terminal statuses (first is primary). Validated by eval_runner.py.

expected_fields.description: Expected final field values for comparison.

mock_extraction.description: Mock LLM extraction used in eval mode.

expected_trace.description: Optional trace expectations (documented in schema.md, not yet in corpus).

expected_failures.description: Optional expected failure codes for cohort reporting.

notes.description: Optional free-text notes about this test case.
